title: astragalus guatemalensis var. guatemalensis
intro: Astragalus guatemalensis var. guatemalensis, also known as Guatemalan milk vetch, is a perennial legume plant native to the mountainous regions of Guatemala. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus guatemalensis var. guatemalensis are said to include reduced inflammation, improved immune function, and enhanced cardiovascular health. The plant is traditionally used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and supplements, often in combination with other herbs to promote overall well-being.
